languages.text: "Почему ты просто не соединишь всех три разума в один для основы?"
"Why not just combine all three minds to serve as the basis?"
languages.original_text: "Почему ты просто не соединишь всех три разума в один для основы?"

traits.locale_text: "Why not just combine all three minds to serve as the basis?"
"Why not just combine all three minds to serve as the basis?"
"Why not just combine all three minds to serve as the basis?"

languages.text: 「3つの心を一つにして、その基盤にしよう」
languages.original_text: "Why not just combine all three minds to serve as the basis?"

traits.locale_text: 「3つの心を一つにして、その基盤にしよう」

languages.text: “为什么不干脆将三个意识融合在一起，作为基体？”
languages.original_text: "Why not just combine all three minds to serve as the basis?"

traits.locale_text: “为什么不干脆将三个意识融合在一起，作为基体？”

languages.text: «¿Por qué no combina las tres mentes como base?».
languages.original_text: "Why not just combine all three minds to serve as the basis?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Por qué no combina las tres mentes como base?».

languages.text: "Warum kombiniert Ihr die drei Verstande nicht einfach zu einer Basis?"
languages.original_text: "Why not just combine all three minds to serve as the basis?"

traits.locale_text: "Warum kombiniert Ihr die drei Verstande nicht einfach zu einer Basis?"

languages.text: « Pourquoi ne pas simplement combiner les trois esprits pour servir de base ? »
languages.original_text: "Why not just combine all three minds to serve as the basis?"

traits.locale_text: « Pourquoi ne pas simplement combiner les trois esprits pour servir de base ? »

languages.text: "Neden temel olarak hizmet etmesi için üç zihni de birleştirmiyorsunuz?"
languages.original_text: "Why not just combine all three minds to serve as the basis?"

traits.locale_text: "Neden temel olarak hizmet etmesi için üç zihni de birleştirmiyorsunuz?"
